tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
G#1
[ch]D#m7/G#[/ch] [ch]G#7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]E/F#[/ch]
[ch]D#m7/G#[/ch] [ch]G#7[/ch] [ch]C#m7[/ch] [ch]E/F#[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]                  [ch]Bmaj9[/ch]                                      [ch]A#m7-5[/ch]
I'll give you the sun, the rain, the moon, the stars and the mountains[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#7b9[/ch]              [ch]G#m9[/ch]      [ch]B/F#[/ch]
I'll give you the world, and all that you wish for[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Fm7-5[/ch]
And even more[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em6[/ch]                                     [ch]D#m7[/ch]
Girl, I'll love you more than you could know[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G#7sus4[/ch]
And that's for sure[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m9[/ch]
I'd climb the highest hill, cross the widest sea[/tab]

Nothin' could discourage me
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#m9[/ch]
And I pray that you'll be always there for me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E/F#[/ch]
Forevermore[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]D#m7/G#[/ch]         [ch]G#7[/ch]
Ready or not[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]E/F#[/ch]
I'll give you everything and more[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7/G#[/ch]                 [ch]G#7[/ch]
All that I've got, it's yours[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I'll give you everything[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/F#[/ch]
All that you're looking for[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]                 [ch]Bmaj9[/ch]                                  [ch]A#m7-5[/ch]
I'll give you my heart, my soul, my time, my love is a fountain[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#7b9[/ch]              [ch]G#m9[/ch]      [ch]B/F#[/ch]
I will be your earth, ooh, and all that you need for[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm7-5[/ch]
And even more[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em6[/ch]                                 [ch]D#m7[/ch]
'Cause girl I love you more than words can show[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G#7sus4[/ch]
My love is pure[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G#m7[/ch] [ch]C#m9[/ch]
I, I'd walk a thousand miles, sail a thousand seas[/tab]

Nothin' will discourage me
[tab][ch]D#m7[/ch]   [ch]C#m9[/ch]
And I pray that you will be always there for me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E/F#[/ch]
Forevermore[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]D#m7/G#[/ch]                                                 [ch]G#7[/ch]
Ready or not (Don't you know, don't you know, you should know)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]E/F#[/ch]
I'll give you everything (ooh) and more (I'll give you more, you've got to know it, baby)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7/G#[/ch]                       [ch]G#7[/ch]
All that I've got (Baby, it's yours, little girl)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I'll give you everything (Every little thing)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/F#[/ch]
All that you're looking for[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D#7sus4[/ch]
Everything is not anything[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#m7[/ch]
If you're not here to share my dreams[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#7sus4[/ch]
You don't know what it means to me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G#m7[/ch]
If you'll accept my love[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Ooh, I dedicate my love, my soul[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D#m7[/ch]           [ch]G#m7[/ch]
My heart beats for you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Girl, I can't get enough so I'll wait for your love[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E/F#[/ch]
There's nothing that I'd rather do[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]D#m7/G#[/ch]         [ch]G#7[/ch]
Ready or not[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]                     [ch]E/F#[/ch]
I'll give you everything (ooh lady) and more (I'll give you more, you've got to know it, baby)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7/G#[/ch]                 [ch]G#7[/ch]
All that I've got, it's yours (Hey, it's yours)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I'll give you everything (It's yours)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/F#[/ch]
All that you're looking for[/tab]

[tab] [ch]D#m7/G#[/ch]         [ch]G#7[/ch]
Ready or not[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]                     [ch]E/F#[/ch]
I'll give you everything (ooh lady) and more[/tab]
[tab][ch]D#m7/G#[/ch]                 [ch]G#7[/ch]
All that I've got, it's yours (Hey, it's yours)[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m7[/ch]
I'll give you everything (It's yours)[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/F#[/ch]
All that you're looking for[/tab]
